caption: A person holds a framed baseball card featuring a photo of player Tim Raines, who is wearing a red jersey and a baseball cap. The card includes the text "TIM R.A.I.N.E.S" across the bottom. The frame is positioned in front of a computer screen displaying a website with the logo "JASPYS" and the URL "CASEBREAKS.COM". In the lower right corner of the screen, a smaller inset video shows a man with a beard wearing a dark blue t-shirt. As the sequence progresses, the person's hand moves across the card, and they use a small tool to carefully lift the protective plastic sleeve from the top edge of the framed card. The background consists of a cluttered desk area with various sports memorabilia and equipment, maintaining a consistent setting throughout the action.
